calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

David Marcolini, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff Citibank, N.A.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Gustavo A. Amador.
Declaration of Dorothy Ruiz pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Citibank, N.A. and against Defendant Gustavo A. Amador as follows:
Principal $8,702.09
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $310.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $9,012.09
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Set For Trial On Feb-03-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
